# third_party

Vendored sources used by `cpe_agent` optional features.

| Tree | License | Use |
|------|---------|-----|
| `lua-5.4.7/` | MIT | Embedded Lua VM (`CPE_AGENT_WITH_LUA`) |
| `linenoise/` | BSD-2-Clause | Readline-like REPL + history |

Lua was obtained from https://www.lua.org/ftp/lua-5.4.7.tar.gz  
linenoise from https://github.com/antirez/linenoise
